name: First Baptist Church Texarkana
description: First Baptist Church Texarkana is a place to play pickleball in Texarkana, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Southwest Center Park
description: Southwest Center Park is a place to play pickleball in Texarkana, TX. There are 11 hard courts. 3 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.
